mapper.select: SELECT c.COMPANY_NM as companyNm, d.DEPT_NM as deptNm, NULL as manageNm, m.MENU_NM as menuNm, m.MENU_LINK as menuLink, u.USER_NM as userNm, a.USER_ID as userId, a.MENU_CD as menuCd, a.ACCESS_DT as accessDt, a.MENU_TYPE as menuType, a.USER_SESSION_ID as userSessionId, a.USER_IP as userIp FROM TC_USER_ACCESS_LOG a LEFT JOIN TC_USER u ON a.USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TC_DEPT d ON u.DEPT_CD = d.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN TC_COMPANY c ON u.COMPANY_CD = c.COMPANY_CD LEFT JOIN TC_MENU m ON a.MENU_CD = m.MENU_CD WHERE a.ACCESS_DT >= #{startDate} AND a.ACCESS_DT < #{endDate} ORDER BY a.ACCESS_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
